{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "IT Support Assistant",
  "description": "Johngate Industrial Company Limited human safety and comfort in driving is our most valuable priority,that is while we are the best suppliers of quality automobile products in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Support Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Alakija, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities of an IT Support Assistant


	Technical Support:&nbsp;Resolves user issues with software, hardware, and networks (e.g., printers, laptops, VPN, and email problems) via walk-ins, email, or remote tools.
	Hardware and Software Setup:&nbsp;Installs, configures, and updates workstations, operating systems, and applications for employees.
	Maintenance &amp; Security:&nbsp;Monitors systems to ensure proper function, applies security patches, updates antivirus software, and maintains inventory of equipment.
	Account Administration:&nbsp;Creates, updates, and manages user accounts, permissions, and security settings.
	Documentation &amp; Training:&nbsp;Creates, updates, and maintains documentation, technical guides, or FAQs for hardware/software use.
	IT Infrastructure Support:&nbsp;Assists in organizing and maintaining the server room or network infrastructure, including troubleshooting connectivity.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications and work experience.


Method of application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to:&nbsp;johngate1234hr@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Proximity will be given to applicants living within and around Alakija environs.",

IT Support Assistant Job at Johngate Industrial Company Limited




        
    

        
        Johngate Industrial Company Limited human safety and comfort in driving is our most valuable priority,that is while we are the best suppliers of quality automobile products in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Support Assistant

Job Location: Alakija, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities of an IT Support Assistant
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Technical Support: Resolves user issues with software, hardware, and networks (e.g., printers, laptops, VPN, and email problems) via walk-ins, email, or remote tools.
	Hardware and Software Setup: Installs, configures, and updates workstations, operating systems, and applications for employees.
	Maintenance & Security: Monitors systems to ensure proper function, applies security patches, updates antivirus software, and maintains inventory of equipment.
	Account Administration: Creates, updates, and manages user accounts, permissions, and security settings.
	Documentation & Training: Creates, updates, and maintains documentation, technical guides, or FAQs for hardware/software use.
	IT Infrastructure Support: Assists in organizing and maintaining the server room or network infrastructure, including troubleshooting connectivity.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications and work experience.


Method of application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Proximity will be given to applicants living within and around Alakija environs.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Electrician",
  "description": "Luxsit Integration Limited is a smart home solution company located in the heart of Lagos. Our main focus is to bring people and technology together. We handle all aspects of your technology project including design, scheduling, project management, installation, and service and support. We are a customer service-oriented company and strive for complete customer satisfaction. With our experienced and trained dedicated team of tech experts, bringing your dreams to reality. At Luxsit integration &ndash; whether the project is new construction or retrofit, we integrate seamlessly with all involved to deliver custom, lifestyle inspired solutions across the spectrum of automation, audio/video, cinema rooms, lighting, climate, and security.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrician

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Installing, maintaining, and repairing electrical control, wiring, and lighting systems.
	Reading technical diagrams and blueprints.
	Performing general electrical maintenance.
	Inspecting transformers, circuit breakers, and other electrical components.
	Troubleshooting electrical issues using appropriate testing devices.
	Repairing and replacing equipment, electrical wiring, and fixtures.
	Following National Electrical Code state and local building regulations.
	Performing circuit breaker corrective maintenance.
	Maintaining good knowledge of heating and air conditioning systems as well as various testing equipment.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an OND or FSLC with 2-3 years of experience.
	Completion of electrician apprenticeship.
	Experience working as an electrician.
	High school diploma.
	Valid driver&#39;s license.
	Electrician degree from a technical college.
	Deep electrical system, power generation, blueprints, maintenance, and repair knowledge.
	Experience in the renewable energy field.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to:&nbsp;lillian.owoseni@luxsitintegration.com&nbsp;or&nbsp;hr@luxsitintegration.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Electrician Job at Luxsit Integration Limited




        
    

        
        Luxsit Integration Limited is a smart home solution company located in the heart of Lagos. Our main focus is to bring people and technology together. We handle all aspects of your technology project including design, scheduling, project management, installation, and service and support. We are a customer service-oriented company and strive for complete customer satisfaction. With our experienced and trained dedicated team of tech experts, bringing your dreams to reality. At Luxsit integration – whether the project is new construction or retrofit, we integrate seamlessly with all involved to deliver custom, lifestyle inspired solutions across the spectrum of automation, audio/video, cinema rooms, lighting, climate, and security.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrician

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Installing, maintaining, and repairing electrical control, wiring, and lighting systems.
	Reading technical diagrams and blueprints.
	Performing general electrical maintenance.
	Inspecting transformers, circuit breakers, and other electrical components.
	Troubleshooting electrical issues using appropriate testing devices.
	Repairing and replacing equipment, electrical wiring, and fixtures.
	Following National Electrical Code state and local building regulations.
	Performing circuit breaker corrective maintenance.
	Maintaining good knowledge of heating and air conditioning systems as well as various testing equipment.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an OND or FSLC with 2-3 years of experience.
	Completion of electrician apprenticeship.
	Experience working as an electrician.
	High school diploma.
	Valid driver's license.
	Electrician degree from a technical college.
	Deep electrical system, power generation, blueprints, maintenance, and repair knowledge.
	Experience in the renewable energy field.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] or [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Technical Sales Executive",
  "description": "Structured Resource Business Limited is a product of its founders desire to efficiently provide business solutions and market access to American, European and Asian organisations, who are looking to enter into the Nigerian and West African market place with products and services. We provide both practical and profitable business solutions to a broad range of Nigerian businesses and pride ourselves on placing clients first and providing value for money. Structured Resource was founded in 2004 to address the need for a reliable, customer oriented partner organisation in Nigeria and across the West African region. The founders and partners are former Business Managers, Telecom Build Engineers, Bankers, Scientists, Software Engineers and Systems Architects based in Nigeria, America, Sweden and the United Kingdom. We boast a strong network of contacts throughout industry in both national and international arenas, with strong links with product manufacturers, distributors, suppliers, and sales specialists.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Technical Sales Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Sales
Reports To: Sales Manager

Job Summary


	We are seeking a motivated and results-oriented Technical Sales Executive to join our dynamic sales team.
	The ideal candidate will have a strong technical background combined with excellent sales skills, capable of presenting complex products and solutions to clients effectively.


Key Responsibilities
Sales Development:


	Identify and target potential clients through research and networking.
	Develop and maintain relationships with existing and prospective clients.


Product Knowledge:


	Understand and articulate the technical aspects of our products and services.
	Stay updated with industry trends, technologies, and competitors.


Sales Presentations:


	Create and deliver compelling sales presentations and product demonstrations.
	Customize solutions based on client needs and requirements.


Proposal Development:


	Prepare and present detailed proposals and quotations.
	Collaborate with engineering and product teams to ensure proposals align with client specifications.


Negotiation &amp; Closing:


	Negotiate terms and conditions with clients to close deals.
	Achieve and exceed sales targets and quotas.


Customer Support:


	Provide ongoing technical support and training to clients post-sale.
	Gather client feedback to improve products and services.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in engineering, Computer Science, Business, or a related field.
	Proven experience in technical sales or a similar role.
	Strong understanding of [specific technologies or products relevant to the company].
	Excellent communication and presentation skills.
	Ability to build rapport with clients and understand their technical needs.
	Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to think critically.


Benefits


	Competitive salary and commission structure.
	Health and wellness benefits.
	Opportunities for professional development and career growth.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;jobs@structuredresource.com&nbsp;using&nbsp;the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Technical Sales Executive Job at Structured Resource Business Limited




        
    

        
        
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    

Structured Resource Business Limited is a product of its founders desire to efficiently provide business solutions and market access to American, European and Asian organisations, who are looking to enter into the Nigerian and West African market place with products and services. We provide both practical and profitable business solutions to a broad range of Nigerian businesses and pride ourselves on placing clients first and providing value for money. Structured Resource was founded in 2004 to address the need for a reliable, customer oriented partner organisation in Nigeria and across the West African region. The founders and partners are former Business Managers, Telecom Build Engineers, Bankers, Scientists, Software Engineers and Systems Architects based in Nigeria, America, Sweden and the United Kingdom. We boast a strong network of contacts throughout industry in both national and international arenas, with strong links with product manufacturers, distributors, suppliers, and sales specialists.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Technical Sales Executive

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Sales
Reports To: Sales Manager

Job Summary


	We are seeking a motivated and results-oriented Technical Sales Executive to join our dynamic sales team.
	The ideal candidate will have a strong technical background combined with excellent sales skills, capable of presenting complex products and solutions to clients effectively.


Key Responsibilities
Sales Development:


	Identify and target potential clients through research and networking.
	Develop and maintain relationships with existing and prospective clients.


Product Knowledge:


	Understand and articulate the technical aspects of our products and services.
	Stay updated with industry trends, technologies, and competitors.


Sales Presentations:


	Create and deliver compelling sales presentations and product demonstrations.
	Customize solutions based on client needs and requirements.


Proposal Development:


	Prepare and present detailed proposals and quotations.
	Collaborate with engineering and product teams to ensure proposals align with client specifications.


Negotiation & Closing:


	Negotiate terms and conditions with clients to close deals.
	Achieve and exceed sales targets and quotas.


Customer Support:


	Provide ongoing technical support and training to clients post-sale.
	Gather client feedback to improve products and services.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree in engineering, Computer Science, Business, or a related field.
	Proven experience in technical sales or a similar role.
	Strong understanding of [specific technologies or products relevant to the company].
	Excellent communication and presentation skills.
	Ability to build rapport with clients and understand their technical needs.
	Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to think critically.


Benefits


	Competitive salary and commission structure.
	Health and wellness benefits.
	Opportunities for professional development and career growth.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Key Account / Sales Executive",
  "description": "Lheon Consulting Limited is a strategy development and talent consultancy company, devoted exclusively to career shaping and personal development activities.We work globally with professionals and experts in the financial sectors to offer resourceful training, assessment and recruitment services to financial and non-bank financial institutions through use of innovative technologies to achieve a perfect workplace.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Key Account / Sales Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job&nbsp;Description


	Evaluate and monitor outlet and channels profitability.
	Establish the service standard for Mega Accounts, measure efficiency against the standard and close down the gaps.
	In cases of credit customers (Megas) be responsible for debt reconciliation and recovery of aged debts.
	Do category analysis/brand analysis by Mega Account/Non mega and share the analysis with line managers.
	Have deep knowledge of company products range (SKUs, brands name, flavor, packaging, freshness, prices, company policy in connection to merchandising, product freshness) and communicate same to customers.
	Maximizes all opportunities in the process of closing a sale to a Key Account shopper resulting in the taking of market share from competitors in-store.
	Ensure accurate data capture in Out of Stock and off-take reports and other records to achieve a quality database.
	Share the captured data with HO for analysis, review and improvement purposes.
	Rotate stock at POS and replace overage stocks if necessary.
	Work to a specified plan covering each location in-store/ different stores&nbsp;systematically to improve off-take of all BA products.
	Adherence to work hour&nbsp;schedule and route plan.
	Assists in the implementation of company marketing plans as needed.
	Inform management of any new developments in the store/ stores i.e. competitive activity, new product launch etc.
	Create strong relationship with store-manager, floor operations, supervisors,&nbsp;syndicated merchandisers of the organization and other merchandisers of other&nbsp;companies.
	Representing the company at trade promotions and expo&rsquo;s&nbsp;Direct/guide, control and generally oversee the work of any direct &amp; indirect associate placed under him/her.
	Ensure products are available in good condition, if needed, rotate stock in&nbsp;first-expiry first-out basis (FEFO).
	Ensure his/her planograms are always kept according to instructions.
	Assist and involve in training of new recruits of merchandisers
	Responsible for creation&nbsp;of demand from store and not just service the demand.


Requirements


	Candidates must have a working vehicle for mobility.
	Candidates must be available to resume immediately.


Benefits


	Salary: N500,000 per month.&nbsp;
	Sales Commission: varies based on performance.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV&nbsp;to:&nbsp;onye.ijeomah@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Please apply only if you have sold wine and spirit or currently selling wine and spirit.
	We will reach out to only eligible candidates.

Key Account / Sales Executive Job at Lheon Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        Lheon Consulting Limited is a strategy development and talent consultancy company, devoted exclusively to career shaping and personal development activities.We work globally with professionals and experts in the financial sectors to offer resourceful training, assessment and recruitment services to financial and non-bank financial institutions through use of innovative technologies to achieve a perfect workplace.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Key Account / Sales Executive

Job Location: Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Evaluate and monitor outlet and channels profitability.
	Establish the service standard for Mega Accounts, measure efficiency against the standard and close down the gaps.
	In cases of credit customers (Megas) be responsible for debt reconciliation and recovery of aged debts.
	Do category analysis/brand analysis by Mega Account/Non mega and share the analysis with line managers.
	Have deep knowledge of company products range (SKUs, brands name, flavor, packaging, freshness, prices, company policy in connection to merchandising, product freshness) and communicate same to customers.
	Maximizes all opportunities in the process of closing a sale to a Key Account shopper resulting in the taking of market share from competitors in-store.
	Ensure accurate data capture in Out of Stock and off-take reports and other records to achieve a quality database.
	Share the captured data with HO for analysis, review and improvement purposes.
	Rotate stock at POS and replace overage stocks if necessary.
	Work to a specified plan covering each location in-store/ different stores systematically to improve off-take of all BA products.
	Adherence to work hour schedule and route plan.
	Assists in the implementation of company marketing plans as needed.
	Inform management of any new developments in the store/ stores i.e. competitive activity, new product launch etc.
	Create strong relationship with store-manager, floor operations, supervisors, syndicated merchandisers of the organization and other merchandisers of other companies.
	Representing the company at trade promotions and expo’s Direct/guide, control and generally oversee the work of any direct & indirect associate placed under him/her.
	Ensure products are available in good condition, if needed, rotate stock in first-expiry first-out basis (FEFO).
	Ensure his/her planograms are always kept according to instructions.
	Assist and involve in training of new recruits of merchandisers
	Responsible for creation of demand from store and not just service the demand.


Requirements


	Candidates must have a working vehicle for mobility.
	Candidates must be available to resume immediately.


Benefits


	Salary: N500,000 per month. 
	Sales Commission: varies based on performance.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Please apply only if you have sold wine and spirit or currently selling wine and spirit.
	We will reach out to only eligible candidates.
    

    

        Click here to Apply
